ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage of the tournament */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (if applicable) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee assigned to the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in the stadium */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, postponed, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_group_name FOREIGN KEY ("group_name") REFERENCES groups ("group_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home stadium */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team manager */,
  "current_squad_size" INTEGER /* Number of players currently in the team's squad */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* JSON object containing social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the manager */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the manager */,
  "career_start" TEXT /* Year the manager started their career */,
  "career_end" TEXT /* Year the manager ended their career */,
  "current_team" INTEGER /* ID of the current team the manager is managing (if applicable) */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* JSON object containing a list of previous teams managed by the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stadium is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "built_year" TEXT /* Year the stadium was built */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the stadium */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the stadium */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the stadium */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the stadium's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the stage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is currently with */,
  "joined_team" TEXT /* Year the player joined the team */,
  "left_team" TEXT /* Year the player left the team */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (e.g., left, right) */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* JSON object containing a list of previous teams the player has played for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player in the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player in the match */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target by the player in the match */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player in the match */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "home_possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession for the home team */,
  "away_possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession for the away team */,
  "home_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the home team */,
  "away_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the away team */,
  "home_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the home team */,
  "away_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the away team */,
  "home_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners earned by the home team */,
  "away_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners earned by the away team */,
  "home_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the home team */,
  "away_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the away team */,
  "home_offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside violations by the home team */,
  "away_offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside violations by the away team */,
  "home_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the home team */,
  "away_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the away team */,
  "home_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the home team */,
  "away_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, fan) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "favorite_team" INTEGER /* ID of the user's favorite team */,
  "last_report_generated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last report generated by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_favorite_team FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions for the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, create) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., match analysis, team performance) */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file where the report is stored */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage of the tournament */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the group stage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the group stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stages" (
  "team_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team stage record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage of the tournament */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group (if applicable) */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the team in the group or stage */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "goals_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals for - goals against) */,
  "last_match_played" TEXT /* Date of the last match played in the stage */,
  "next_match_date" TEXT /* Date of the next match in the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stages_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stages_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stages_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
